title: 3 key points from class
prompt: Write three ideas you need to remember from today’s class lecture.
whyItHelps: This turns a big topic into a fast review card.

title: Top 3 tasks
prompt: List the three most important tasks you need to finish today.
whyItHelps: It keeps your notes focused on priorities instead of everything at once.

title: Upcoming deadline
prompt: Create a note card for your next assignment, quiz, or meeting deadline.
whyItHelps: This helps you turn reminders into quick action items.

title: What went well today?
prompt: Write one short reflection about something productive or positive from today.
whyItHelps: Small reflections make your note stack feel more personal and useful.

title: App feature idea
prompt: Capture one feature or improvement idea you could add to StackyNotes later.
whyItHelps: It gives you a place to save useful ideas before you forget them.

title: Sort a messy thought
prompt: Take one random thought and rewrite it as a short, organized note card.
whyItHelps: This shows how notes can turn clutter into something clear and reusable.

title: Quick boost
prompt: Write a short quote, goal, or sentence that keeps you motivated.
whyItHelps: Motivation cards make the app feel more like a real daily tool.
